name: A-Star Theft
short_description: The ultimate criminal action sandbox! Sneak or force your way forward using skill, ingenuity, and power. Play as Logan Huntborn, and fight to keep your crew safe and free after getting offered a deal. Now includes Freeplay, for unlimited replayability!
detailed_description:
Three years ago, Logan Huntborn was part of a group trying to take down a criminal organization known as The Opposition. Despite their best efforts, the organization persists. Now that Logan has escaped from prison, The Opposition is out for blood.

By their side, Huntborn and his crew have the chief of police protecting them while seeking to rid the police force of corruption. In return, he can offer them the freedom they always wanted.

KEY FEATURES

DYNAMIC GAMEPLAY

A-Star Theft is designed to accommodate your playstyle. The game offers a wide variety of choices and opportunities, and some strategies may not be very obvious at first.

VIOLENCE

Run and gun, get in and out as quickly as possible or face an aggressive police force head-on, utilizing a complex dynamic gore system with pixel-level details.

STEALTH

Sneak past hostiles and use your smarts to achieve your goals.

VARIED ENEMIES

Encounter foes of many kinds, including officers, gangsters, snipers and even police drones!

CONTROL YOUR CREW

With help from your loyal crew, work side by side to secure victory.

WEAPONS STORE

Use equipment to your advantage. Whether you want a high power assault rifle or nasty toxic gas, the store has it all.
